name.en: Ars Magna of Purification and Corruption
name.ja: <ruby>浄<rt>じょう</rt></ruby><ruby>化<rt>か</rt></ruby>と<ruby>腐<rt>ふ</rt></ruby><ruby>敗<rt>はい</rt></ruby>のアルス＝マグナ

text.en: You can banish this card from your hand; add 1 "Ars Magna" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, also until the end of the next turn, the first 3 times each of your "Power Patron" Link Monsters would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. If an Xyz and/or Link Monster(s) is Special Summoned while this card is banished (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card. You can target Spells/Traps on the field up to the number of "Power Patron" Link Monsters you control; banish them. You can only use each effect of "Ars Magna of Purification and Corruption" once per turn.
